title: Start Where You Are
subtitle: Your first expedition
learning_goal: Practice the basic loop: find, photograph, identify, and save real organisms.
intro: Warm up with a simple field set: one plant, one insect, and one surprise organism from wherever you are.
outro: You just contributed real data to science. Welcome to Hinterland.

steps.hint: Grass, a weed in a sidewalk crack, a tree, a houseplant by a window -- all count.
Check under a leaf, near flowers, or on a wall.
Bird, fungus, spider, snail -- surprise us.
